song.title: Free From the Law
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Free from the law— oh, happy condition! Jesus has bled, and there is remission; Cursed by the law and bruised by the fall, Christ has redeemed us once for all.
[C] Chorus Once for all— oh, sinner, receive it; Once for all— oh, brother, believe it; Cling to the cross, the burden will fall, Christ has redeemed us once for all.
[V2] 2) There on the cross Your burden up-bearing, Thorns on His brow Your Savior is wearing; Never again your sin need appall, You have been pardoned once for all.
[V3] 3) Now we are free— There’s no condemnation; Jesus provides a perfect salvation: “Come unto Me,” oh, hear His sweet call, Come, and He saves us once for all.
[V4] 4) “Children of God”— Oh, glorious calling, Surely His grace will keep us from falling; Passing from death to life at His call, Blessed salvation once for all.
song.author: Philip P. Bliss
